title: urostigma procerum
side_effects: Urostigma procerum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and vomiting in some individuals due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may also lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of bleeding due to its anticoagulant properties. In severe cases, using Urostigma procerum without proper guidance can cause seizures, coma, or even death. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may interact with other medications, resulting in adverse reactions and complications.
